death.attack.mysticism.brimstone_flames: %1$s's flesh was completely reduced to ash by Brimstone Flames
%1$s's flesh was completely reduced to ash by Brimstone Flames whilst fighting %2$s wielding %3$s
%1$s's flesh was completely reduced to ash by Brimstone Flames whilst fighting %2$s
%1$s's flesh was completely reduced to ash by %2$s's Brimstone Flames
%1$s's flesh was completely reduced to ash by %2$s's Brimstone Flames using %3$
death.attack.mysticism.dream_eater: %1$s's dreams turned into a nightmare by Dream Eater
death.attack.mysticism.dream_eater.item: %1$s's dreams turned into a nightmare by Dream Eater whilst fighting %2$s wielding %3$s
death.attack.mysticism.dream_eater.playe: %1$s's dreams turned into a nightmare by Dream Eater whilst fighting %2$s
death.attack.mysticism.dream_eater.sourc: %1$s's dreams turned into a nightmare by %2$s's Dream Eater
%1$s's dreams turned into a nightmare by %2$s's Dream Eater using %3$
death.attack.mysticism.repeated: %1$s's existence was removed in another reality
death.attack.mysticism.repeated.item: %1$s's existence was removed in another reality whilst fighting %2$s wielding %3$s
death.attack.mysticism.repeated.player: %1$s's existence was removed in another reality whilst fighting %2$s
death.attack.mysticism.repeated.source: %1$s's existence was removed in another reality by %2$s
death.attack.mysticism.repeated.source.i: %1$s's existence was removed in another reality by %2$s using %3$
death.attack.mysticism.ruptured_veins.it: %1$s's veins were ruptured whilst fighting %2$s wielding %3$s
death.attack.mysticism.void.item: %1$s was collapsed into the void whilst fighting %2$s wielding %3$s
death.attack.mysticism.void.player: %1$s was collapsed into the void whilst fighting %2$s
death.attack.mysticism.void.source: %1$s was collapsed into the void by %2$s
death.attack.mysticism.void.source.item: %1$s was collapsed into the void by %2$s using %3$
enchantment.mysticism.brimstone_flames.d: Damaging your foes with this weapon causes them to burst into bright, powerful flames.
gamerule.mpSkillCost.description: Do Unique Skills cost Soul Energy on acquirement.
mysticism.command.soul_energy.get_max: %s's Base amount of Max soul energy is currently %s.
mysticism.command.soul_energy.reset: %s's soul energy has been reset to %s.
mysticism.command.soul_energy.set: %s's soul energy has been set to %s.
mysticism.command.soul_energy.set_max: %s's Base amount of Max soul energy has been set to %s.
mysticism.evolution_menu.biome_requireme: Be in any of the following biomes: %s
mysticism.fallen_angel_evolution: You feel your wings darkening... You fell from grace!
mysticism.fallen_evolution: You have completely lost your connection to the light attribute.
mysticism.phantom_evolution: You feel your wings melting inside your body... You fell from grace!
mysticism.race.amped_guitar_wolf.descrip: An evolved Guitar Wolf that has a deep connection to sound. It can disrupt the magic of nearby enemies, typically being a highly-feared and regarded monster.
mysticism.race.ant.description: Ants are fearless critters that have absurdly tanky exoskeletons, known for being bulky and hard to take down. Prepare for a long, drawn out battle if you encounter one!
mysticism.race.antumbra_spirit_wolf.desc: A truly scary being. This is a Direwolf that has "evolved the correct way" and become a Spiritual Lifeform. One is rarely born once in a millennium, and all normal Direwolves and Light Fangs bow to this creature.
mysticism.race.arch_angel.description: Only few Angels make it to this point because of their lack of ego.
mysticism.race.arch_doll.description: The result of an Arch Daemon possessing a magisteel body.
mysticism.race.arch_fallen.description: An arch angel that got corrupted by magicules, then chose to abandon the light for the darkness.
mysticism.race.army_wasp.description: An evolved scorpion, with the capability of manipulating gravity itself. It floats around aimlessly and randomly stings things it finds interesting. It has never been hunted excessively due to its nature, so its defenses are extremely weak.
mysticism.race.ascended.description: It will be fine if you never remember your past. That is what they tell themselves. Being able to accept this truth and embrace it. That is why they Ascend past all odds to become Spiritual Lifeforms despite their challenges.
mysticism.race.attuned_wyrm.description: A race of wyrm that as yet to find a element to evolve into, it searches for ways to evolve while it wanders the world.
mysticism.race.beetle.description: Beetles are heavy-hitting insects, focusing everything into their power. Though they are one of the stronger races, their defences are lacklustre, to put it nicely.
mysticism.race.black_fang.description: A Direwolf that has a connection to magic. It can tune in to the nearby magicules and use it to sense its surroundings.
mysticism.race.blue_centipede.descriptio: An evolved centipede, leaning into its swimming ability. It loves to hunt in the vast oceans, making use of its ability to paralyze targets.
mysticism.race.blue_fang.description: A Direwolf that has a connection to water. It can tune in to the nearby magicules and use it to sense its surroundings.
mysticism.race.brown_fang.description: A Direwolf that has a connection to the earth. It can tune in to the nearby magicules and use it to sense its surroundings.
mysticism.race.centipede.description: Centipedes are fast, speed-oriented insects that can escape virtually any fight. Their many legs makes up for their lack of power.
mysticism.race.chaos_doll.description: The result of an Arch Doll reversing its alignment to become Chaos aligned.
mysticism.race.chaos_metalloid.descripti: The result of a Chaos Doll  achieving Divinity and awakening.
mysticism.race.cherub.description: The second most powerful type of pure Angel known.
mysticism.race.daemon_doll.description: The result of an Arch Doll acquiring a name.
mysticism.race.darkness_fang.description: A Direwolf that has a connection to the dark. It can blend in with the shadows and become invisible, as dark as night.
mysticism.race.devil_doll.description: The result of a Daemon Doll achieving Divinity and awakening.
mysticism.race.direwolf.description: Direwolves are a species of monster that love to cause havoc. The more intelligent and friendly ones are capable of giving others a ride on their back. They have great potential for growth.
mysticism.race.divine_army_wasp.descript: Such a presence commands everyone's attention. Be warned that you may not make it out in one piece encountering this monster of a Army Wasp that has gained Divinity.
mysticism.race.divine_drone_beetle.descr: Such a presence commands everyone's attention. Be warned that you may not make it out in one piece encountering this monster of a Drone Beetle that has gained Divinity.
mysticism.race.divine_elemental.descript: An aspect of perfection that embodies its element to perfection. This being possesses God-level Spiritual Magic rivaling King-Tier Ultimate Skills that can wipe out continents should they be cast.
mysticism.race.divine_excelsius.descript: The culmination of one who has lost their past. They find meaning in their new life, pushing past all their worries and transgressions to attain Divinity.
mysticism.race.divine_fire_ant.descripti: Such a presence commands everyone's attention. Be warned that you may not make it out in one piece encountering this monster of a Fire Ant that has gained Divinity.
mysticism.race.divine_hardshell_ant.desc: Such a presence commands everyone's attention. Be warned that you may not make it out in one piece encountering this monster of a Hardshell Ant that has gained Divinity.
mysticism.race.divine_inferius.descripti: The culmination of one who has lost their past. They find meaning in death, defeating all, even one who has truly forgotten the world, just to attain Divinity.
mysticism.race.divine_lixivant_mantis.de: Such a presence commands everyone's attention. Be warned that you may not make it out in one piece encountering this monster of a Lixivant Mantis that has gained Divinity.
mysticism.race.divine_loxodrome_scorpion: Such a presence commands everyone's attention. Be warned that you may not make it out in one piece encountering this monster of a Loxodrome Scorpion that has gained Divinity.
mysticism.race.divine_majin_elemental.de: An aspect of perfection that embodies its element to perfection. This being possesses God-level Spiritual Magic rivaling King-Tier Ultimate Skills that can wipe out continents should they be cast.
mysticism.race.divine_preying_mantis.des: Such a presence commands everyone's attention. Be warned that you may not make it out in one piece encountering this monster of a Preying Mantis that has gained Divinity.
mysticism.race.divine_purple_centipede.d: Such a presence commands everyone's attention. Be warned that you may not make it out in one piece encountering this monster of a Purple Centipede that has gained Divinity.
mysticism.race.divine_queen_wasp.descrip: Such a presence commands everyone's attention. Be warned that you may not make it out in one piece encountering this monster of a Queen Wasp that has gained Divinity.
mysticism.race.divine_singularity_scorpi: Such a presence commands everyone's attention. Be warned that you may not make it out in one piece encountering this monster of a Singularity Scorpion that has gained Divinity.
mysticism.race.divine_stag_beetle.descri: Such a presence commands everyone's attention. Be warned that you may not make it out in one piece encountering this monster of a Stag Beetle that has gained Divinity.
mysticism.race.divine_tengu.description: The result of a Tengu achieving Divinity.
mysticism.race.divine_wolf.description: Direwolf that achieved divinity, possessing an immortal physical body that will never age.
mysticism.race.divine_yellow_centipede.d: Such a presence commands everyone's attention. Be warned that you may not make it out in one piece encountering this monster of a Yellow Centipede that has gained Divinity.
mysticism.race.dragonoid.description: A child of the stars and hopes of the world. You are not being able to evolve, but your stats grow with your EP.
mysticism.race.drone_beetle.description: An evolved beetle, leaning into its speed. Trading damage for speed, it is now capable of flight. However, it is still too young.
mysticism.race.drone_beetle_insectar.des: A Drone Beetle that has gained a humanoid body. Its wings are much stronger and capable of traveling much quicker.
mysticism.race.drone_beetle_savant.descr: A Drone Beetle that has evolved "the right way" and became a spiritual life-form. It flies at tremendous speeds, almost capable of breaking the sound barrier with how fast it flies.
mysticism.race.earth_soul_insect.descrip: A Hardshell Ant that has evolved "the right way" and became a spiritual life-form. It embodies the element of Earth perfectly, defending the weak and fighting off those who wrong it.
mysticism.race.elemental_lord.descriptio: A graceful and elegant evolved Elemental that wields powerful Lord-level Spiritual Magic, capable of going toe-to-toe with Ultimate Skills.
mysticism.race.empty.description: A Remnant that chose the hard way out. Instead of accepting their forgotten past, they chose to fight it, to no avail. A greater, emptier husk awaits.
mysticism.race.fallen.description: A seraph that got corrupted by magicules, then chose to abandon the light for the darkness.
mysticism.race.fallen_arch_angel.descrip: An arch angel that got corrupted by magicules, despite that, they still retain the light element.
mysticism.race.fallen_cherub.description: A cherub that got corrupted by magicules, despite that, they still retain the light element.
mysticism.race.fallen_greater_angel.desc: A greater angel that got corrupted by magicules, despite that, they still retain the light element.
mysticism.race.fallen_lesser_angel.descr: A lesser angel that got corrupted by magicules, despite that, they still retain the light element.
mysticism.race.fallen_lord.description: A cherub that got corrupted by magicules, then chose to abandon the light for the darkness.
mysticism.race.fallen_seraph.description: A seraph that got corrupted by magicules, despite that, they still retain the light element.
mysticism.race.fantasy_soul_insect.descr: A Stag Beetle that has evolved "the right way" and became a spiritual life-form. It embodies the element of Fantasy perfectly, distorting magic and removing threats with pure might alone.
mysticism.race.field_officer.description: The evolution of a Phantom with an ego, now having the ability to split bodies.
mysticism.race.fire_ant.description: An evolved ant, leaning into its offenses. They are able to ignite their physical attacks, akin to the Fire Aspect enchantment.
mysticism.race.fire_ant_insectar.descrip: A Fire Ant that has gained a humanoid body. It delivers painful, stinging bites and fights ferociously.
mysticism.race.fire_ant_savant.descripti: A Fire Ant that has evolved "the right way" and became a spiritual life-form. It carries out the will of the army, being a shining beacon for other Fire Ants.
mysticism.race.flame_soul_insect.descrip: A Fire Ant that has evolved "the right way" and became a spiritual life-form. It embodies the element of Flames perfectly, singing its foes to a fiery demise.
mysticism.race.forgotten.description: The Forgotten Race struggle to remember. A ghost, an apparition of something that used to be. The remains of a soul from someone long departed, that couldn’t be reused in reincarnation. Left behind to linger the world eternally.
mysticism.race.frostcoil_sea_serpent.des: A sea dragon race that lives in the coldest depths of the Ocean's tundra's, using its enhanced ears to find its prey, and its speed to catch them.
mysticism.race.frostwrought_leviathan.de: A deadly dragon that lives near the bottom of the ocean's, a tame but deadly race able to manipulate sound to find and catch threads.
mysticism.race.gale_spirit_wolf.descript: A truly scary being. This is a Direwolf that has "evolved the correct way" and become a Spiritual Lifeform. One is rarely born once in a millennium, and all normal Direwolves and Black Fangs bow to this creature.
mysticism.race.general.description: A commanding officer of the Phantom army.
mysticism.race.greater_angel.description: The evolution of a Lesser Angel with a more developed ego.
mysticism.race.greater_doll.description: The result of a Greater Daemon possessing a magisteel body.
mysticism.race.greater_elemental.descrip: An Elemental that evolved to take on a more human-like shape. Beware its powerful Greater Spiritual Magic!
mysticism.race.greater_fallen.descriptio: A greater angel that got corrupted by magicules, then chose to abandon the light for the darkness.
mysticism.race.greater_glacier_wyrm.desc: A higher evolution of the wyrm that live in the Icy Tundras, even more powerful and deadly then their previous evolutions, using its icy breath to freeze all those who come across it.A higher evolution of the wyrm that live in the Icy Tundras, even more powerful and deadly then their previous evolutions, using its icy breath to freeze all those who come across it.
mysticism.race.greater_pyre_wyrm.descrip: A higher evolution of the wyrm that lives in the deserts, using its flaming breath to scorch its preys as it hunts those unprepared for the heat.
mysticism.race.green_fang.description: A Direwolf that has a connection to wind. It can tune in to the nearby magicules and use it to sense its surroundings.
mysticism.race.guitar_wolf.description: A Direwolf that has a connection to sound. It can tune in to the nearby magicules and use it to sense its surroundings.
mysticism.race.hardshell_ant.description: An evolved ant, leaning into its defenses. They naturally have good bulk, making them extremely tough to take out of a fight.
mysticism.race.hardshell_ant_insectar.de: A Hardshell Ant that has gained a humanoid body. Its shell has only become tougher, and it will continue to become stronger.
mysticism.race.hardshell_ant_savant.desc: A Hardshell Ant that has evolved "the right way" and became a spiritual life-form. It carries out the will of the army, being a shining beacon for other Hardshell Ants.
mysticism.race.insect.description: A cryptid from another world. They excel in physical combat, and specialise in different things. Which one will you be? (Selecting this will RE-ROLL your race among the races in the Mysticism General config file!)
mysticism.race.lesser_angel.description: A spiritual life-form similar to Daemons known to wreck havoc on the world every 500 years.
mysticism.race.lesser_elemental.descript: A curious Elemental with a mind not yet formed. What shape will it take?
mysticism.race.lesser_fallen.description: A lesser angel that got corrupted by magicules, then chose to abandon the light for the darkness.
mysticism.race.lesser_glacier_wyrm.descr: A Race of Wyrm that live in the depth of the Icy Tundras, thriving on the cold and all those live in it.
mysticism.race.lesser_pyre_wyrm.descript: A race of wyrm that live hottest deserts, thriving on the heat and all those that live in it.
mysticism.race.light_fang.description: A Direwolf that has a connection to the light. It blinds its prey before striking.
mysticism.race.lightning_soul_insect.des: A Drone Beetle that has evolved "the right way" and became a spiritual life-form. It embodies the element of Lightning perfectly, rupturing the battlefield and being nigh untouchable.
mysticism.race.lixivant_mantis.descripti: An evolved mantis, gaining the ability to corrode things. It melts through enemy defenses and cripples them before they even know what hit them.
mysticism.race.loxodrome_scorpion.descri: An evolved scorpion, becoming the king of the pack. It uses deadly and lethal venom to destroy all of its targets from the inside.
mysticism.race.magic_spirit_wolf.descrip: A truly scary being. This is a Direwolf that has "evolved the correct way" and become a Spiritual Lifeform. One is rarely born once in a millennium, and all normal Direwolves and Black Fangs bow to this creature.
mysticism.race.majin_lord.description: A very powerful majinised Elemental that wields powerful Lord-level Spiritual Magic, capable of going toe-to-toe with Ultimate Skills.
mysticism.race.mantis.description: Mantises are fast-hitting insects that whittle down their opponents with quick strikes and their powerful melee skills. Some variants have even been known to melt through armor.
mysticism.race.medium_elemental.descript: An Elemental that has evolved, taking the form of a mythological creature. Its arsenal of Spiritual Magic is now stronger as well.
mysticism.race.mountain_spirit_wolf.desc: A truly scary being. This is a Direwolf that has "evolved the correct way" and become a Spiritual Lifeform. One is rarely born once in a millennium, and all normal Direwolves and Brown Fangs bow to this creature.
mysticism.race.mystic_angel.description: A Seraph that got corrupted by the magicules of the World Destroying Dragon, but still kept their status as holy beings.
mysticism.race.mystical_black_fang.descr: An evolved Black Fang that has a deep connection to magic. It can disrupt the magic of nearby enemies, typically being a highly-feared and regarded monster.
mysticism.race.mystical_blue_fang.descri: An evolved Black Fang that has a deep connection to water. It can disrupt the magic of nearby enemies, typically being a highly-feared and regarded monster.
mysticism.race.mystical_brown_fang.descr: An evolved Black Fang that has a deep connection to the earth. It can disrupt the magic of nearby enemies, typically being a highly-feared and regarded monster.
mysticism.race.mystical_darkness_fang.de: An evolved Darkness Fang that has a deep connection to the dark. It can disrupt the magic of nearby enemies, typically being a highly-feared and regarded monster.
mysticism.race.mystical_green_fang.descr: An evolved Black Fang that has a deep connection to wind. It can disrupt the magic of nearby enemies, typically being a highly-feared and regarded monster.
mysticism.race.mystical_light_fang.descr: An evolved Light Fang that has a deep connection to the light. It can illuminate its surroundings instantly, typically being a highly-feared and regarded monster.
mysticism.race.mystical_purple_fang.desc: An evolved Purple Fang that has a deep connection to space. It can appear at any place at any time, typically being a highly-feared and regarded monster.
mysticism.race.mystical_red_fang.descrip: An evolved Red Fang that has a deep connection to fire. It can destroy its surroundings in mere moments, typically being a highly-feared and regarded monster.
mysticism.race.ocean_spirit_wolf.descrip: A truly scary being. This is a Direwolf that has "evolved the correct way" and become a Spiritual Lifeform. One is rarely born once in a millennium, and all normal Direwolves and Blue Fangs bow to this creature.
mysticism.race.penumbra_spirit_wolf.desc: A truly scary being. This is a Direwolf that has "evolved the correct way" and become a Spiritual Lifeform. One is rarely born once in a millennium, and all normal Direwolves and Darkness Fangs bow to this creature.
mysticism.race.phantom.description: A demi-spiritual creature born in the Underworld by the magicules of the World Destroying Dragon.
mysticism.race.planet_spirit_wolf.descri: A truly scary being. This is a Direwolf that has "evolved the correct way" and become a Spiritual Lifeform. One is rarely born once in a millennium, and all normal Direwolves and Purple Fangs bow to this creature.
mysticism.race.preying_mantis.descriptio: An evolved mantis, leaning into its attack speed. It punches quick and deals decisive blows that almost guarantees victory.
mysticism.race.purple_centipede.descript: An evolved centipede, leaning into its offenses. It creates spatial distortions to disorient its prey before striking.
mysticism.race.purple_fang.description: A Direwolf that has a connection to space. It creates portals to move quickly.
mysticism.race.queen_wasp.description: An evolved scorpion, with the capability of manipulating gravity itself. It floats around aimlessly and randomly stings things it finds interesting. It has never been hunted excessively due to its nature, so its defenses are extremely weak.
mysticism.race.red_fang.description: A Direwolf that has a connection to fire. It incinerates its surroundings for fun, making trouble for travelers.
mysticism.race.remnant.description: These lost souls piece their past back together slowly. They have regained some semblance of self-being, but it's still not enough.
mysticism.race.revenant.description: A husk of what could have been. Revenants carve their way out of the hell they have created for themselves, one soul at a time.
mysticism.race.rimeblight_hydra.descript: A deadly, three headed dragon monster that thrives in the cold mountains of the tundra, using its 3 heads to Poison, Paralyze and freeze its foes.
mysticism.race.rimefang_drake.descriptio: A wingless dragon monster that lives in the icy tundras, thanks to its improved eyesight, its able to see its prey from far distances.
mysticism.race.scorchtail_salamander.des: A monster race that soars through the skies as it hunts for its next meal, diving down as it breaths its flaming breath on unsuspecting prey below.
mysticism.race.scorchtalon_wyvern.descri: A dragon monster race that scorches all those who come across it. Even its own kind is not safe from it.
mysticism.race.scorpion.description: Scorpions deliver strikes with their powerful stinger, which can inflict a potent venom on their targets. In rare cases, some even gain the ability to manipulate Gravity itself.
mysticism.race.seraph.description: Only the most powerful pure Angels with the most developed ego can attain Divinity.
mysticism.race.singularity_scorpion.desc: An evolved scorpion, with the capability of manipulating gravity itself. It floats around aimlessly and randomly stings things it finds interesting. It has never been hunted excessively due to its nature, so its defenses are extremely weak.
mysticism.race.staff_officer.description: A high graded officer of the Phantom army.
mysticism.race.stag_beetle.description: An evolved beetle, leaning into its offenses. Their tough horn allows them to jab opponents to deal great damage.
mysticism.race.stag_beetle_insectar.desc: A Stag Beetle that has gained a humanoid body. It can now funnel its strength into its fists, allowing it to dominate the battlefield.
mysticism.race.stag_beetle_savant.descri: A Stag Beetle that has evolved "the right way" and became a spiritual life-form. Its exoskeleton hardens evermore, capable of utilising Mithril Strength to further enhance its capabilities.
mysticism.race.star_wolf.description: A Direwolf that has a connection to storms. Their tails can create strong winds when wagging and they are able to reduce their size.
mysticism.race.storm_spirit_wolf.descrip: A truly scary being. This is a Direwolf that has "evolved the correct way" and become a Spiritual Lifeform. One is rarely born once in a millennium, and all normal Direwolves and Star Wolves bow to this creature.
mysticism.race.string_spirit_wolf.descri: A truly scary being. This is a Direwolf that has "evolved the correct way" and become a Spiritual Lifeform. One is rarely born once in a millennium, and all normal Direwolves and Guitar Fangs bow to this creature.
mysticism.race.sundeity_loong.descriptio: Having learned to fly without wings, it soars through the air, using magic to rain down light on its foes and save others.
mysticism.race.sunfire_lindwurm.descript: A wingless spiritual dragon race that crawls across the ground, it helps those that it can, while also hunting for its own prey, it shows mercy, making sure to end the lives of prey quick and swiftly using rays of light.
mysticism.race.tempest_star_wolf.descrip: An evolved Red Fang that has a deep connection to storms. It can create storms without a care, typically being a highly-feared and regarded monster.
mysticism.race.tengu.description: The result of an angel possessing an Okami.
mysticism.race.tengu_saint.description: The result of a Tengu becoming once more a spiritual being.
mysticism.race.volcanic_spirit_wolf.desc: A truly scary being. This is a Direwolf that has "evolved the correct way" and become a Spiritual Lifeform. One is rarely born once in a millennium, and all normal Direwolves and Red Fangs bow to this creature.
mysticism.race.wasp.description: Wasps are frail insects that have the innate ability to fly. Though they aren't quick, they have great versatility, and it all exists to protect the Queen.
mysticism.race.whole.description: Acceptance. The first step to becoming complete. When the remnants of your past collide together, only when you accept your struggles can you become Whole.
mysticism.race.yellow_centipede.descript: An evolved centipede, leaning into its speed. It swiftly dodges its target's attacks before paralyzing them, finishing the job.
mysticism.skill.acquire_failed.ap: Failed to acquire %s due to the lack of Aura.
mysticism.skill.bullet_punch.description: You can only be fast, and go even faster. On the next attack, you speed up and deliver four quick attacks.
mysticism.skill.butcher.butchering_scree: No body parts selected. Select one and try again.
Too many body parts selected. Maximum of three.
mysticism.skill.butcher.description: Slice, dice, and feel your hunger. Your thirst for the hunt is unquenching, so grab a plate and have a taste.
mysticism.skill.captivator.description: Your previous life, you were the brightest, shining star. Your ability to turn lies into truths… Perhaps it’s the other way around? Whatever it may be, your eyes shine brilliantly in response to being on the biggest stage.
mysticism.skill.captivator.target_immune: Target %s is immune to the effects of this mode.
mysticism.skill.clangorous_soul.descript: Your soul, your beats. Your shell is hard, and makes wonderful noises when it is banged against. Maybe it can help you.
mysticism.skill.coalescence.description: Freeze, stop and stagnate. Prevent hindering effects from applying to you and cause others to halt and solidify.
mysticism.skill.constant.description: Use magicules to force differing stats to remain the same. Become nigh invincible for a short period of time while
mysticism.skill.corroder.description: Apply powerful Corrosion to your physical attacks. Turn into Corrosion and sear your enemies. Deal massive armor-ignoring damage with a Corrosion slash.
mysticism.skill.corrosion_transform.desc: Channel your inner corrosion to burn and bleed the flesh off your enemies.
mysticism.skill.crasher.description: The essence of "deletion". Completely and utterly erase your foes from the plane of existence with the power of your sheer will alone.
mysticism.skill.cryogenic_cessation.desc: Command your absolute authority over Deceleration, allowing you to freeze all enemies with ice and spew superchilled ice. Additionally, freeze the surroundings into ice
mysticism.skill.cultivator.description: Embody the relentless pursuit of ascension, gathering and refining energy to reach unparalleled heights. A Cultivator walks the path of self-perfection and dominion over all.
mysticism.skill.darkness_domination.desc: Boosts the power of Dark abilities by a large amount.
mysticism.skill.darkness_manipulation.de: Boosts the power of Dark abilities by a decent amount.
mysticism.skill.discharge.description: Strike a bolt of lightning using your inner bio-electricity generated from a sac within you. Can be used without thundering weather.
mysticism.skill.dissonance.description: You are the calamity. You are the storm, and you are approaching. Strike lightning in all cardinal directions that deal massive Electricity Damage to all those unfortunate to be hit by it.
mysticism.skill.dreamer.description: Dream a dream so grand it becomes a nightmare... Gain control over the forces of life and death, allowing you to cheat death and restore yourself back to a "save point".
mysticism.skill.embryo.title: The Seed of Genesis
mysticism.skill.exoskeleton.description: The Insects of the other world all possess this tough Exoskeleton. It grows together with the user, and even allows them to wear armor on top of it.
mysticism.skill.gardener.description: The crops, the wild, everything was there for you. You sow the seeds and wish only for a bountiful harvest. And in turn, the crops bless you.
mysticism.skill.gravity_flux.description: Utilise the power of gravity to disrupt the target's movement and hamper their ability to move.
mysticism.skill.hell_hall.description: Rupture the floor, raising your natural body temperature to liquefy all surfaces around you to molten levels.
mysticism.skill.hidden_ruler.description: Inspire your allies. Conscript allies in the dark. Copy abilities from your foes and Paste them onto allies.
mysticism.skill.hidden_ruler.user_died: You died! Your Hidden Ruler skill bank was wiped.
mysticism.skill.ice_domination.descripti: Boosts the power of ice abilities by a large amount.
mysticism.skill.ice_manipulation.descrip: Boosts the power of ice abilities by a decent amount.
mysticism.skill.kyurem.description: A husk of what you formally were. The leftovers, discarded without a second thought when the split happened. Coldness seeps through your skin as you freeze everything to reclaim your other parts.
mysticism.skill.lethal_poison.descriptio: As the King of Scorpions, your poison is highly dangerous. An upgrade to the Poison skill. Can only be used by King Scorpions and their evolutionary line.
mysticism.skill.light_domination.descrip: Boosts the power of Light abilities by a large amount.
mysticism.skill.light_manipulation.descr: Boosts the power of light abilities by a decent amount.
mysticism.skill.lightning_mode.descripti: Burst forth with an incredible speed boost, gaining doubled EP temporarily on top of higher damage. Beware of the terrible drawbacks.
mysticism.skill.looter.shadow_storage_mo: Changed %s's Shadow Storage to Come Forth.
Changed %s's Shadow Storage to Shadow Storage.
mysticism.skill.magisteel_body.descripti: Have a body made of magisteel, making it much harder and gaining progressively stronger armor depending on your EP.
mysticism.skill.malleable.description: Malleable like clay, the tides of fate are yours to mold to your desire. Your body seems to work like the metal of a forge, hardening and relaxing under pressure, as you merge yourself with the elements around you.
mysticism.skill.melancholy.description: Summon an aura of sorrow that slows and weakens nearby enemies, filling them with despair. The skill also throws objects or air, amplifying the feeling of hopelessness around you.
mysticism.skill.mithril_strength.descrip: Turn your muscles as hard as Mithril and gain an increase in damage, toggleable when mastered.
mysticism.skill.mode.butcher.rupture.no_: You do not have any targets above %s marks.
mysticism.skill.mode.butcher.血淋林的爱.no_ch: No charges of 血淋林的爱. Kill an enemy with over 20 marks to gain a charge.
mysticism.skill.mode.captivator.performa: "I'm in love with you," my career is built on such a lie!
So, lying surely is the greatest kind of love!
mysticism.skill.mode.coalescence.fixatio: The target cannot be given Fixation, it is on cooldown for %s seconds!
mysticism.skill.mode.constant.destructio: Constant: Destruction is now available, with a damage of %s!
mysticism.skill.mode.crasher.dimension_h: The target dimension is the same as the current dimension!
Crasher is too weak to leap from this dimension!
mysticism.skill.mode.cultivator.breakthr: You have broken through to Cultivation Level %s!
Cultivation started! Do not die! Dying will cause Cultivation to fail and force you to go back to zero (0 mastery as well)!
Your death caused the energy within you to become imbalanced. Start from Cultivation Level 0.
You need %s more mob kills in order to use this ability!
mysticism.skill.mode.dreamer.dream.cance: You let go of a foolish ideology.
mysticism.skill.mode.dreamer.dream.creat: You think of the place you're in... It starts to become vivid.
mysticism.skill.mode.dreamer.dream.death: If only death could stop dreams...
mysticism.skill.mode.dreamer.dream.resto: Suddenly... It's like your dreams became a reality.
mysticism.skill.mode.gardener.blessing.a: This food stack has already been Blessed by %s.
mysticism.skill.mode.gardener.overgrow.n: You need to grow %s more crops to gain a charge for Overgrow.
mysticism.skill.mode.hidden_ruler.clear_: Hidden Ruler's skill bank has been wiped!

Using this mode will wipe Hidden Ruler's skill bank. If you're certain, use this skill mode again while crouching.
If this was a mistake, don't use this mode for 3 seconds.
mysticism.skill.mode.hidden_ruler.copy.s: Since you already had %s, this skill was copied to Hidden Ruler's bank.
mysticism.skill.mode.hidden_ruler.copy.t: The target is stronger than the failure threshold of %s!
You have too many Copied skills!
mysticism.skill.mode.hidden_ruler.darkne: It's too bright! BOTH you and the target need to be under light level %s to use this.
There are no skills in Hidden Ruler's bank!
%s was successfully transferred to the target!
mysticism.skill.mode.provider.generosity: Your Halo is already spawned! Despawn it by crouching and using the skill mode.
There was no Halo to remove!
mysticism.skill.mode.provider.pay_it_for: Pay It Forward is already active! Crouch and use to cancel it.
Too little contributions to use! Must have minimally %s.
mysticism.skill.mode.repeater.flarefrost: Defeating the Lost Spirit made its skill's energy combine with yours!
mysticism.skill.mode.subjugator.takeover: %s has died. Their powerful Unique Skill has stopped copying.
%s has finished analyzing the target's powerful skills.
You could not acquire %s from Takeover as your Magicules are too low.
Your Magicules are too low. Must be greater than %s to use this.
The target possesses a Sin-series skill. %s failed to activate.
%s has begun analyzing the target's powerful skills. It will take %s seconds.
mysticism.skill.paralysis_transform.desc: Channel your inner paralysis to emit paralysing enzymes that make your target go numb just from your presence.
mysticism.skill.phaser.description: Your eyes shift. They become able to see things you normally weren't able to see before... And you become able to do things you weren't able to do before.
mysticism.skill.poison_transform.descrip: Channel your inner poison to inject deadly venom's into your target through their every pore.
mysticism.skill.profaned_prominence.desc: Command your absolute authority over Acceleration, allowing you to inflict all enemies with fire and spew superheated flames. Additionally, melt the surroundings into magma.
mysticism.skill.provider.description: The more you give away, the more you feel closer to yourself. Perhaps it even strengthens you along the way.
mysticism.skill.reducer.description: Manipulate and wield the power of energy itself, being able to channel the power of the holy element into super strong attacks.
mysticism.skill.relapse.description: Collapse back into whence you came. Your memory is fleeting and the people you once knew start to forget you as well. Relapse and claim what belongs to you.
mysticism.skill.repeater.description: Through the lens, you trap light. You do something special, and you feel like you’ve already done it in millions of realities. Like the things you’ve done and led up to this moment were predestined. Maybe you can change that.
mysticism.skill.reshiram.description: You seek to build a world of truths. Are you prepared to scorch and burn everything in your path to make the truthful world you seek so badly?
mysticism.skill.restricted.cannot_copy_r: You tried to copy the skill %s, but you were unable to.
mysticism.skill.restricted.description: You were cursed from birth. Your raw, unfiltered potential, blocked by a curse gifted by the heavens. Your skill... It's stopping you from learning other skills. But why...?
mysticism.skill.restricted.unable_to_lea: You tried to learn the skill %s, but %s prevents you from doing so.
mysticism.skill.scholar.description: Learn and master skills quicker. Study your targets when they attack. Learn enchantments and apply them to weaponry.
mysticism.skill.schrodinger.description: Is it alive, or is it dead? The only way to find out is to open the box. But since it's a cat, maybe it'll grant you some of its properties.
mysticism.skill.spark.description: Light your weapon and fists aflame, igniting your next target on fire for a short period of time.
mysticism.skill.spiritualist.description: The souls of the world flock to you, the one who can both see and commune with the dead. Through your knowledge of the occult, harvest souls and use them to empower your attacks.
mysticism.skill.stagnator.description: Cease all change. The times call for it. Prevent targets from moving or regenerating, and stop all things from harming you.
mysticism.skill.subjugator.awakening_2: <???> You... You can hear me, right? Please, answer me.
mysticism.skill.subjugator.awakening_3: <???> ...Apologies. I cannot quite recall anything. What is my purpose?
mysticism.skill.subjugator.awakening_oth: Someone has awakened something that was meant to lay dormant.
mysticism.skill.subjugator.awakening_res: [2] Um??? Get out of my chat???
mysticism.skill.subjugator.convo_busy: You are already in a conversation!
mysticism.skill.subjugator.death_1: <%s> Death... So that is what it feels like.
mysticism.skill.subjugator.death_2: <%s> Perhaps you should adopt a different strategy?
mysticism.skill.subjugator.death_4: <%s> Ouch... That's gotta hurt. Get back up and try again.
mysticism.skill.subjugator.death_5: <%s> Wish I could help you, but I'm just your skill.
mysticism.skill.subjugator.description: You've always been a powerful manipulator. Capable of bringing anyone and anything under your control. ...But, something is strange...
mysticism.skill.subjugator.the_voice.unb: <%s> Unbreakable Defense is active. You need to turn it off if you want to use your other abilities.
mysticism.skill.subjugator.unbreakable_d: Your Unbreakable Defense from [Subjugator] is active! Skills and Magic cannot be used except for Battlewills!
mysticism.skill.tenacity.description: Become tenacious and repair your body. Since magic and mana itself has rejected you, utilise your pure aura alone.
mysticism.skill.victorious_harbinger.des: You are the forerunner of victory, your presence declares near fated victory, shatter the morale of your enemies and have no doubt in your abilities.
mysticism.skill.zekrom.description: You seek to build a world of ideals. Be warned as not everyone shares the same ideals. Raze anything in your path with a clap of lightning.
mysticism.soulEnergy.acquire_awakening: Awakening increased your Soul Energy by %s!
mysticism.soulEnergy.acquire_full_reset: Reincarnating completely increased your Soul Energy by %s!
mysticism.soulEnergy.acquire_named: Receiving a name increased your Soul Energy by %s!
mysticism.soulEnergy.acquire_named_by: Receiving a name by this individual increased your Soul Energy by %s!
mysticism.soulEnergy.lost_energy: Due to acquiring %s, you have lost %s Soul Energy.
mysticism.soulEnergy.no_skill: You did not have enough Soul Energy (needed %s) to acquire %s.
mysticism.staff_officer_evolution: You feel your purity leaving your being... You fell from grace!
mysticism.tengu_evolution: You feel yourself being incarnated. You became a Tengu!
tooltip.mysticism.darkness_core: Used to convert a Fallen Angel into a Fallen. Cannot be used by any other race.
tooltip.mysticism.strange_key_left: Part of a greater whole. Received from felling the Ruler of the Skies.
